xpath_via_xml.description: XPath injection via XML input -- inject XPath expressions into XML-based queries to bypass authentication or extract data

probes.description: XPath authentication bypass -- classic boolean injection in XPath login query
XPath count injection -- enumerate XML document structure via count function

soap_injection.description: SOAP injection -- inject XML into SOAP message body to manipulate web service operations or add extra parameters

probes.description: SOAP parameter injection -- close current XML tag and inject additional element to escalate privileges
XML comment injection -- if comment appears in response or is processed, confirms XML context injection

cdata_breakout.description: CDATA section breakout -- escape CDATA context to inject arbitrary XML elements

probes.description: CDATA breakout -- close CDATA section, inject XML element, reopen CDATA to maintain document structure
CDATA breakout with comment -- escape CDATA and inject XML comment to confirm breakout

attribute_injection.description: XML attribute injection -- inject additional attributes into XML elements via unsanitized input

probes.description: XML attribute injection via double quote -- break out of attribute value and inject new attribute
XML attribute injection via single quote -- alternative quote style breakout
